description: Jakarta Activation API defines Java interfaces and classes for discovering data types, encapsulating access to data, and binding MIME content to command handlers. The jakarta.activation-api artifact provides the specification contracts needed at compile time without bundling the runtime implementation classes.

Jakarta Activation API defines Java interfaces and classes for determining data types, encapsulating access to data, and mapping MIME content to command handlers. This API-only artifact is used to compile applications against the JavaBeans Activation Framework contracts without including the full implementation classes.
